steps.title: Force a contradiction
steps.content:
For no solution, the coefficient of $x$ must be $0$, while the right side stays $90$.
$$-5+20p=0$$

steps.title: Solve for the parameter
steps.content:
Solve the equation.
$$20p=5$$
$$p=\frac{5}{20}=\frac14$$
Then the original equation becomes $0=90$, which has no solution. The answer is B.
